events.event_description: Hezekiah Gold Rogers presented credentials as Chargé d'Affaires to Sardinia (capital Turin), establishing the first U.S. diplomatic mission.

evidence.quote: Hezekiah Gold Rogers, Chargé d'Affaires. Appointed: 1840-06-05. Credentials presented: 1840-09-15. Presented recall on 1841-11-22. Note: Commissioned to Sardinia (capital at Turin).

events.event_description: Isaac Wayne Macveagh presented credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, elevating the U.S. mission from a Legation to an Embassy.

evidence.quote: Isaac Wayne Macveagh, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1893-12-20. Credentials presented: 1894-03-11. Left post on 1897-03-04.

events.event_description: Italy declared war on the United States, ending U.S. diplomatic representation in Italy.

evidence.quote: George Wadsworth, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1941-10. Italy declared war on the United States 1941-12-06.

events.event_description: Alexander Comstock Kirk presented credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, re-establishing the U.S. Embassy in Italy after the break caused by World War II.

evidence.quote: Alexander Comstock Kirk, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1944-12-08. Credentials presented: 1945-01-08. Left post on 1946-03-05.
